title: Verify View All link visibility
description: Validate that the "View All" link is displayed and clickable in card header

steps.action: Navigate to dashboard 2. Locate Medication Fill History card
steps.expected_result: "View All" link is visible, aligned per design & clickable

title: Validate timeline dropdown options
description: Ensure timeline dropdown shows all expected options

steps.expected_result: Options including All Time, 1 Month, 2 Months, 3 Months, 4 Months, 5 Months etc. visible

title: Validate Drug Name search functionality
description: Ensure dynamic search works for partial & full match

steps.action: Enter text in drug search field 2. Observe list
steps.expected_result: Drug list filters dynamically based on text search

title: Validate filtering by timeline only
description: Ensure list updates when only timeline is applied

steps.expected_result: Drugs displayed only from selected timeline window

title: Validate filtering by drug class only
description: Ensure list updates when only drug class is applied

steps.action: Select drug class filter 2. Observe list
steps.expected_result: Only drugs belonging to selected class are shown

title: Validate combination filters
description: Ensure list updates when timeline + class + drug name applied together

steps.action: Select timeline 2. Select class 3. Enter drug name
steps.expected_result: Results reflect all applied filters simultaneously

title: Validate reset of filters on closing modal
description: Ensure previously applied filters are cleared on reopen

steps.action: Apply any filter 2. Close modal 3. Open modal again
steps.expected_result: All filters reset to default and full list displays

title: Validate no results message
description: Ensure “No records found” appears when filters return zero results

steps.action: Apply search/filter criteria that returns no results
steps.expected_result: Show “No records found” centered & styled per design

title: Validate scroll behavior of drug list
description: Ensure modal allows vertical scroll when list exceeds view height

steps.expected_result: List scrolls smoothly without breaking UI layout

title: Validate table column alignment
description: Ensure columns display in correct order per figma

title: Validate date format
description: Ensure Fill Date remains in MM/DD/YYYY format

title: Validate no page reload during filter interaction
description: Ensure filtering/searching does NOT reload whole UI

steps.expected_result: Page does not reload; only list refreshes dynamically

title: Validate loading indicator
description: Ensure loader appears while list is querying backend

steps.expected_result: Loader shows & disappears once results load

title: Validate tab/keyboard navigation
description: Ensure user can operate inputs using keyboard

steps.expected_result: Controls shift properly; Enter selects value

title: Validate All Time default display
description: Ensure default drop-down value is All Time
